description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-focus-ring` (T4-03) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, offset/width/color typed as design token references
2. Accessibility — focus ring meets WCAG 2.4.11 (Focus Appearance): minimum 2px solid, 3:1 contrast ratio against adjacent colors, offset from component, visible in both light/dark modes, axe-core pass
3. Tests — renders correctly around target element, offset values, color customization, keyboard-only visibility (`:focus-visible`), 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — around buttons, inputs, links; offset variations; dark/light mode contrast
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens for ring width/color/offset, focus-visible polyfill if needed, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — applicable as utility

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-focus-ring — T4-03 antagonistic quality review
